products.name: TGR Series Brushless Motors
products.descriptor: Slotless frameless brushless motor kits for satellite reaction wheel assemblies

evidence.snippet:
TGR Series Brushless Motors
===========================
The TGR Series comprises high-efficiency, slotless, frameless brushless motor kits specifically designed for Reaction Wheel Assemblies (RWAs) in satellite attitude control systems.

products.name: TG Series Brushless Motors
products.descriptor: Slotless frameless brushless motor kits with ironless wavewound stators, zero cogging

evidence.snippet:
**TG Series Brushless Motors**
This series offers high-performance slotless, frameless brushless motor kits with ironless wavewound stators for maximum power density, lightweight design, and zero cogging.

products.name: LS Series Brushless Motors
products.descriptor: Premium slotless frameless brushless motors with cogless design and high torque density

evidence.snippet:
**LS Series Brushless Motors**
These premium slotless, frameless motors deliver unmatched performance with their cogless design, high torque density, and seamless integration capabilities.

products.name: Motors for Drones, UAV, UAS
products.descriptor: Outer-rotor BLDC propulsion motors for drone/UAV/UAS applications, US-manufactured COTS

evidence.snippet:
Motors for Drones, UAV, UAS
===========================
Preliminary Release

Allient brings decades of engineering expertise and high-volume United States manufacturing to the forefront of drone/UAV/UAS propulsion. COTS propulsion motors available for rapid deployment and ESC drivers are under development to support future integration needs.

products.notes: Page labels this as "Preliminary Release". Site states COTS motors available for rapid deployment; high-volume US manufacturing mentioned. ESC drivers noted as under development.

products.name: HT Series Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: High torque density frameless direct-drive brushless motors with hollow-shaft aperture, nine frame sizes

evidence.snippet: HT Series Frameless Torque Motors

Allied Motion’s HT series are high torque density frameless direct drive brushless motors offering nine frame diameters and stall torque ranging from 0.008 up to 9.2 Nm (1.0 up to 1277 oz-in). HT torque motors offer a clear aperture hollow-shaft of up to 63.5 mm (2.5 in). All frameless HT models are equipped standard with a Hall commutation switch assembly.

products.name: SR Series Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Low-profile frameless direct-drive torque motors with large hollow aperture, 38–165 mm frames

evidence.snippet: SR Series Frameless Torque Motors

Our SR series of frameless torque motors are ideal for direct-drive applications, as well as highly integrated precision gear drive applications. Motors are available in various winding options for compatibility with voltages from 24 to 350 volts.

products.name: Pyxmos™ Module Servo Drive
products.descriptor: Compact PCB-mount servo drive module, 12–90 VDC, EtherCAT/CANopen, 20 kHz control loops

evidence.snippet:
Pyxmos™ Module Servo Drive
==========================
*   [
    Download Datasheet
    ](#docs)
*   [
    Download CAD Drawing
    ](#docs)
Pyxmos is a compact, versatile servo drive module engineered for seamless integration into embedded motion control systems. With advanced 20kHz high-speed control loops it delivers unmatched precision for mechatronic, robotic, and nanometer motion applications.

products.name: Megaflux™ Housed Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Housed direct-drive brushless torque motors with integrated servo drive and optical encoder

evidence.snippet: Megaflux™ Housed Torque Motors

Allied Motion offers housed direct drive brushless torque motors ready to mount into your application. Our housed Megaflux™ series has fully integrated units that include a servo drive and an optical encoder with 3,600 Ipr, programmable resolution.

products.name: Quantum™ NEMA Housed Torque Motors
products.descriptor: NEMA-frame housed brushless servo motors in four standard sizes, up to 11.1 Nm rated torque

evidence.snippet: Quantum™ NEMA Housed Torque Motors

Allied Motion offers our housed Quantum™ NEMA high torque density brushless servo motors in four standard frame sizes (17, 23, 34 and 56) with rated torques ranging from 0.05 up to 11.1 Nm (7 up to 1573 oz-in).

products.name: HeiMotion® Dynamic Servo Motors
products.descriptor: Brushless servo motors built for high acceleration, speed, and dynamic responsiveness

evidence.snippet:
**HeiMotion® Dynamic Servo Motors**
These motors are are built for high acceleration, speed, and responsiveness while pairing seamlessly with our optimized servo motor portfolio.

products.name: CM Series Housed Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Housed direct-drive brushless torque motor with eight optical encoder options, 66 mm frame

evidence.snippet: CM Series Housed Torque Motors

Allied Motion offers housed direct drive brushless torque motors ready to mount into your application.
The CM series is available with eight different optical encoder versions, including incremental or absolute formats.

products.name: INB Series Brushless DC Motors
products.descriptor: Small-frame rare-earth brushless DC motors with Hall sensors, 20 and 38 mm frames

evidence.snippet: INB Series Brushless DC Motors

Allied Motion’s INB series are small frame, rare-earth brushless DC motors intended for industrial applications. All models incorporate hall commutation sensors as standard and can be equipped with gearheads to boost output torque.

products.name: C-Series Linear Motors
products.descriptor: Ultra-low-profile ironless cog-free linear motors, up to 143 N peak force

evidence.snippet: C-Series Linear Motors

The C-Series Ironless Linear Motors from Allient offer ultra-low profile, high-performance motion control with a cog-free design. Engineered for high precision and seamless integration, these motors are part of the Allied Motion technology portfolio under Allient, a global leader in Motion, Controls, and Power.

products.name: P-Series Linear Motors
products.descriptor: High-force ironless cog-free linear motors with patented winding, up to 1340 N peak force

evidence.snippet: P-Series Linear Motors

Engineered for precision and power, the P-Series Ironless Linear Motors offer exceptional force density and thermal efficiency. With no cogging and optimized performance, they’re ideal for demanding motion control systems—backed by the reliability of Allient and the motion expertise of Allied Motion.

products.name: CLL Series Brushed DC Motors
products.descriptor: Fractional-HP industrial brushed DC motors, 32 mm frame, up to 11.2 W rated power

evidence.snippet: CLL Series Brushed DC Motors

Allied Motion’s CLL series of industrial brushed DC motors are fractional HP motors with rated power up to 11.2 W and a frame size of 32 mm. Available with optional gearheads to boost torque output to as high as 8.83 Nm (1250 oz-in).

products.name: UAS/UAV/Drone Motors
products.descriptor: Outer-rotor brushless propulsion motors for UAV/UAS, 43–148 mm diameter, Made in USA

evidence.snippet: *   [UAS/UAV/Drone Motors](https://allient.com/product/motors-for-drones-uav-uas/)
#### ✓ Made in the USA

products.name: KinetiMax™ Series High Power Density Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Outer-rotor frameless brushless motor series for high-torque, low-cogging applications

evidence.snippet:
**KinetiMax™ Series High Power Density Frameless Torque Motors**
This outer-rotor brushless motor series is designed for high-torque, low-cogging applications like robotics, AGVs, and power tools.

products.name: SA Series Frameless Axial Flux Motors
products.descriptor: Slotless frameless axial flux direct-drive motors, 30 mm to 1 m diameter, zero cogging

evidence.snippet:
**SA Series Frameless Axial Flux Motors**
With a slotless design for zero cogging torque, these motors offer a low-cost, easily manufactured direct-drive solution that scales seamlessly from 30 mm to over 1 m in diameter through modular construction.

products.name: LSI Series Slotless Motor
products.descriptor: High-performance slotless brushless motor for precision applications, smooth operation

evidence.snippet: ![LSI Series Slotless Motor – High-performance brushless motor designed for precision applications, offering smooth operation and superior efficiency.](https://allient.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Allient_Slotless-Motors_LSI-Series-300x300.webp)

products.name: Mil-Aero Blowers
products.descriptor: Brushed motor blowers for military and aerospace cooling applications

evidence.snippet: *   [Mil-Aero Blowers](https://allient.com/product-category/motors/brushed-motors/mil-aero-blowers/)

products.name: Quantum™ Series Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Frameless inner-rotor torque motors optimized for high power, high torque density, low cogging

evidence.snippet:
**Quantum™ Series Frameless Torque Motors**
Thes motors are electromechanically optimized for high output power, high torque density, and low cogging torque.

products.name: Megaflux™ Series Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Compact frameless torque motor series for advanced robotic applications

evidence.snippet:
**Megaflux™ Series Frameless Torque Motors**
This series of frameless torque motors offers high-performance in a compact package to meet the rigorous demands of advanced robotic applications.

products.name: Electroflux Series Frameless Torque Motors
products.descriptor: Low-profile frameless torque motors with high torque density for demanding applications

evidence.snippet:
**Electroflux Series Framless Torque Motors**
These frameless motors deliver torque density in a low-profile form-factor for optimized integration and performance in demanding applications.

products.name: HeiMotion® Premium Brushless Servo Motors
products.descriptor: Brushless servo motors engineered for maximum precision, efficiency, and smooth operation

evidence.snippet:
**HeiMotion® Premium Brushless Servo Motors**
These motors pair seamlessly with our optimized servo motor portfolio and are engineered for maximum precision, efficiency, and smooth operation.

products.name: PerformeX Slotless Brushless DC Motors
products.descriptor: Miniature slotless BLDC motors delivering up to 2× performance of equivalently sized motors

evidence.snippet:
**PerformeX Slotless Brushless DC Motors**
These miniature slotless BLDC motors to deliver up to twice the performance of equivalently sized motors, making them ideal for precision, compact, high-speed applications in spindles, automation, and robotics.

products.name: MotionSet™ Pro Servo Drive Software
products.descriptor: Servo drive configuration and tuning software with auto-tuning, real-time oscilloscope, and advanced filters

evidence.snippet:
**MotionSet™ Pro Servo Drive Software**
Key features include intelligent auto-tuning for rapid loop optimization, easy to follow drive and motor setup, real-time monitoring with high-resolution oscilloscope views, and advanced filters to reduce noise and vibration for smooth stable motion in even high precision applications.

unresolved_questions: Most product detail pages were skipped_budget; descriptors for 13 of 15 products derive from brief 'Related Products' blurbs on the Pyxmos page rather than full product pages — specs, variants, and ordering info are unavailable.
LSI Series Slotless Motor has no dedicated page in crawl_index; it appears only as an image alt-text on the drone-capabilities page.
Mil-Aero Blowers product page was skipped; no detail beyond navigation-menu listing is available.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims found for any individual product; UAS/UAV/Drone Motors carries a 'Made in USA' claim (not_disclosed) but no explicit NDAA language.
